name: Tim Dillon
bio: Tim Dillon is an American stand-up comedian and podcaster from Island Park, New York, known for a brash, persona-driven style that satirizes American politics, capitalism, and conspiracy culture. He hosts the popular podcast The Tim Dillon Show and has released stand-up specials for Netflix.

timeline.ev: Begins performing stand-up in New York clubs
Performs at the Just for Laughs festival in Montreal
Appears in Netflix's The Comedy Lineup
Releases first Netflix special, A Real Hero
Releases the Netflix special This Is Your Country

bits.t: Tim Dillon Auditioned For The Irishman
